caption: The video begins with a title card that introduces an ORCA Media presentation, which stands for Onion River Community Access. The title card features a clean and professional design with a white rectangular box containing the text "ORCA Media" in bold black and orange letters, followed by the full name "ONION RIVER COMMUNITY ACCESS" in smaller black and orange text. Above and below the box, the words "An" and "Presentation" are displayed in white, set against a black background. This static image serves as an introduction to the content that follows, likely setting the stage for a community-focused media presentation or program. The scene remains unchanged throughout the initial frames, emphasizing the branding and purpose of the presentation.
